description: Known AI provider-cost baseline allowances. Provider-cost internal AI Worker routes require explicit caller policy; member image, music, and video remain gateway-migrated. This machine baseline tracks current technical policy gaps only; live/operator/legal/accounting evidence gaps remain blocked outside this config.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker provider-cost routes fail closed on service auth and caller-policy metadata, but aggregate cap accounting for the caller-enforced internal scope remains future work.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Accepted only because provider execution is service-bound and caller-policy gated; this does not claim live cap enforcement for the internal_ai_worker_caller_enforced aggregate scope.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Future internal caller-enforced aggregate cap accounting
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: service auth, caller route kill switches, and future aggregate internal AI Worker cap switch
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Add a central aggregate ledger/cap for caller-enforced internal AI Worker provider-cost routes after scope-specific evidence and rollback design.

knownGaps.reason: OpenClaw/News Pulse visual provider work has runtime switch and duplicate-suppression metadata, but durable aggregate cap enforcement for openclaw_news_pulse_budget remains future work.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Accepted while News Pulse visuals remain switch-gated and metadata-countable; this does not claim live cap enforcement.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Future OpenClaw/News Pulse aggregate cap enforcement
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Add aggregate cap enforcement over News Pulse visual ingest and scheduled/backfill provider work with bounded evidence and operator rollback notes.

knownGaps.reason: The explicit unmetered Admin Image exception is classified and switch-controlled, but durable aggregate accounting for explicit_unmetered_admin provider-cost usage remains future work.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Accepted only for the narrow explicit unmetered admin branch; unknown admin image models are blocked before provider work and this does not approve broad unmetered provider use.
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: Admin Image budget switch and explicit model allowlist
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Add durable aggregate accounting and evidence for explicit unmetered admin provider-cost branches before expanding usage.
